subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
The RUN n’ GUN FAIR is now live on Steam!
This event brings together a wide selection of Run & Gun titles, featuring fast-paced action and exhilarating firefights.
From nostalgic classics to hot titles currently making waves in the scene, this is your chance to pick up a broad lineup of Run & Gun games at great value.
Of course, Contra: Operation Galuga is also part of the fair!
Take a look at the fair page and see what you feel like playing next.
body_raw:
[h2]The RUN n’ GUN FAIR is now live on Steam![/h2]

This event brings together a wide selection of Run & Gun titles, featuring fast-paced action and exhilarating firefights.
From nostalgic classics to hot titles currently making waves in the scene, this is your chance to pick up a broad lineup of Run & Gun games at great value.
Of course, Contra: Operation Galuga is also part of the fair!
Take a look at the fair page and see what you feel like playing next.

announcement_body.headline: RUN n' GUN FAIR 2026
announcement_body.body:
[h2]The RUN n’ GUN FAIR is now live on Steam![/h2]

This event brings together a wide selection of Run & Gun titles, featuring fast-paced action and exhilarating firefights.
From nostalgic classics to hot titles currently making waves in the scene, this is your chance to pick up a broad lineup of Run & Gun games at great value.
Of course, Contra: Operation Galuga is also part of the fair!
Take a look at the fair page and see what you feel like playing next.

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4039320/KICK_BUDS/
We’re going to run a playtest to improve “KICK BUDS”, a game we’re currently developing.
KICK BUDS is a multiplayer party royale game where players compete against each other using soccer-like moves!
Your feedback and opinions will be used as a reference for future product development. We really appreciate your cooperation.
Test Period: 3/18/2026 07:00 - 3/25/2026 8:00(UTC)
Supported Regions：Brazil, Mexico, U.S.A., Germany, France, Italy, Türkiye, Indonesia, Malaysia, Japan
body_raw:
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4039320/KICK_BUDS/
We’re going to run a playtest to improve “KICK BUDS”, a game we’re currently developing.
KICK BUDS is a multiplayer party royale game where players compete against each other using soccer-like moves!
Your feedback and opinions will be used as a reference for future product development. We really appreciate your cooperation.

Test Period: 3/18/2026 07:00 - 3/25/2026 8:00(UTC)
Supported Regions：Brazil, Mexico, U.S.A., Germany, France, Italy, Türkiye, Indonesia, Malaysia, Japan

announcement_body.headline: “KICK BUDS” Playtest Begins!
announcement_body.body:
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4039320/KICK_BUDS/
We’re going to run a playtest to improve “KICK BUDS”, a game we’re currently developing.
KICK BUDS is a multiplayer party royale game where players compete against each other using soccer-like moves!
Your feedback and opinions will be used as a reference for future product development. We really appreciate your cooperation.

Test Period: 3/18/2026 07:00 - 3/25/2026 8:00(UTC)
Supported Regions：Brazil, Mexico, U.S.A., Germany, France, Italy, Türkiye, Indonesia, Malaysia, Japan

[previewyoutube=Q9TgRLz1rQc;full][/previewyoutube]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text: Fear the truth behind the static. SILENT HILL: Townfall arrives in 2026 Wishlist now on Steam and get ready for release later this year.  Simon Ordell is called back to the island of St. Amelia to ‘put things right’, encountering a town lying quiet beneath a heavy fog, seemingly abandoned but not at rest.   A full-length, self-contained psychological horror set in an isolated corner of Scotland, 1996. Watch the Official Reveal Trailer now and face a new nightmare.

source_title: The latest entry in the series, Castlevania: Belmont's Curse, launches in 2026!
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Crimson Curse —Will Your Fate Bloom in Despair or Salvation
Follow a young Belmont's journey in an all new 2D Action-Exploration title from KONAMI, Evil Empire and Motion Twin.
Medieval Paris, Where the Tolling Bells Herald the End 1499. Paris is engulfed as monstrous creatures suddenly emerge from the shadows.
Armed with the legendary holy whip, the Vampire Killer, Trevor Belmont’s successor ventures into the burning streets and the looming castle to hunt down the beasts.
Will she succeed in saving Paris from devastation…?
Wishlist Now!
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4231820/Castlevania_Belmonts_Curse/

body_text:
Duelists from Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL, Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS, and the Yu-Gi-Oh! TRADING CARD GAME are gathering to compete in their respective games for the title of World Champions.​Tune into the Duels for each category from Swiss Rounds on August 29, all the way to the Grand Finals on August 31 and learn new strategies to play with in Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL and Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS.​ ​​Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2025 Livestream Schedule:​
- Day 1 ​Livestream 09:00 AM CEST​
- Day 2 Livestream 09:45 AM CEST
- Day 3 Livestream 09:30 AM CEST
​Check out the in-game notification for more details!

body_text:
Suikoden Live vol. 3 survey underway📝Updates on the mobile game, the anime, and the stage. First reveal of the 30th anniversary exhibition. Also, we are waiting for your request for the content of the series commentary corner!
📝Click her for the survey📝https://konami.jp/4fhmRm7
🎞Check here the archive🎞 *Please turn on the subtitles.
⭐️Suikoden Live Announcements Part 1⭐️Suikoden STAR LEAP Introducing the battle system and new characters!💥 Battle trailer has also been released⚔️Please follow us on our official X (https://konami.jp/45pXkn7) for the latest information🌸⭐️Suikoden Live Announcements Part 2⭐️Suikoden: The Anime coming in 2026! 🎉A second image visual has also been released✨.Also, from today, the official X (https://konami.jp/4755Ucb) of Suikoden: The Anime has been opened!We will be posting information on the status of production and much more! Please follow us✅⭐️Suikoden Live Announcements Part 3⭐️Suikoden: The Stage schedule released!🗓️
Tokyo stage: December 6 - December 14, 2025
Kyoto stage: December 18 - December 21, 2025
The first image visual is also unveiled! ✨
▼Official website▼
https://konami.jp/4ocuC0B⭐️Suikoden Live Announcements Part 4⭐️Series 30th anniversary Suikoden I&II exhibition – Genso Museum- will be opened!🎉The concept is “a fictional museum” in the world of #Suikoden🏛️▼Official website▼ https://konami.jp/40F6vO6⭐️Suikoden Live Announcements Part 5⭐️Series commentary corner My First Suikoden.The IP supervisor Sakiyama-san explained the “Runes”, the source of the power of all things that move the world of Suikoden!Please take a look!👀⭐️Official X and Steam Page⭐️★Suikoden STAR LEAP

announcement_body.body:
[p]Suikoden Live vol. 3 survey underway📝[/p][p]Updates on the mobile game, the anime, and the stage. First reveal of the 30th anniversary exhibition. [/p][p]Also, we are waiting for your request for the content of the series commentary corner!
[/p][h2]📝Click her for the survey📝[/h2][h2][url="https://konami.jp/4fhmRm7"]https://konami.jp/4fhmRm7[/url]
[/h2][p][/p][h3][b]🎞Check here the archive🎞[/b] [/h3][p]*Please turn on the subtitles.[/p][previewyoutube="E_PMS-6zceU;full"][/previewyoutube][h3]
[b]⭐️Suikoden Live Announcements Part 1⭐️[/b][/h3][previewyoutube="NWnA_oyMSpE;full"][/previewyoutube][p][/p][p]Suikoden STAR LEAP [/p][p]Introducing the battle system and new characters!💥 [/p][p]Battle trailer has also been released⚔️[/p][p]Please follow us on our official X ([url="https://konami.jp/45pXkn7"]https://konami.jp/45pXkn7[/url]) for the latest information🌸[/p][p][/p][p][dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/3668850/_STAR_LEAP/?utm_source=Steam&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=STARLEAP&utm_content=SuikodenLive"][/dynamiclink][/p][p][/p][h3][b]⭐️Suikoden Live Announcements Part 2⭐️[/b][/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42956685/41f39a80ff4170b8edf2d15db2c97eb7f4c16013.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Suikoden: The Anime coming in 2026! 🎉[/p][p]A second image visual has also been released✨.[/p][p]Also, from today, the official X ([url="https://konami.jp/4755Ucb"]https://konami.jp/4755Ucb[/url]) of Suikoden: The Anime has been opened![/p][p]We will be posting information on the status of production and much more! [/p][p]Please follow us✅[/p][p][/p][p][/p][h3][b]⭐️Suikoden Live Announcements Part 3⭐️[/b][/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42956685/668225a4048f5f248865c07bf10ea2131c7936bc.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Suikoden: The Stage schedule released!🗓️

Tokyo stage: December 6 - December 14, 2025 
Kyoto stage: December 18 - December 21, 2025

The first image visual is also unveiled! ✨[/p][p]
▼Official website▼ 
[url="https://konami.jp/4ocuC0B"]https://konami.jp/4ocuC0B[/url][/p][p][/p][p][/p][h3][b]⭐️Suikoden Live Announcements Part 4⭐️[/b][/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42956685/3d81163cda4f4744f4464e56a8b011d52ade21b0.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Series 30th anniversary Suikoden I&II exhibition – Genso Museum- will be opened!🎉[/p][p]The concept is “a fictional museum” in the world of #Suikoden🏛️[/p][p][/p][p]▼Official website▼ [/p][p][url="https://konami.jp/40F6vO6"]https://konami.jp/40F6vO6[/url][/p][p][/p][p][/p][h3][b]⭐️Suikoden Live Announcements Part 5⭐️[/b][/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42956685/9a91ebdd081558dd97f4a56eaa9beb333f01bf6e.jpg"][/img][/p][p]Series commentary corner My First Suikoden.[/p][p]The IP supervisor Sakiyama-san explained the “Runes”, the source of the power of all things that move the world of Suikoden![/p][p]Please take a look!👀[/p][p][/p][p][/p][h3][b]⭐️Official X and Steam Page⭐️[/b][/h3][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42956685/34dfd54ce562439b8c9f3dd222cc8c681454a689.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][p]★Suikoden STAR LEAP

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
A collection featuring the 'Origins' of the 'GRADIUS' series!
Includes 'SALAMANDER III', an all new entree into the legendary side-scrolling shooter series!
This collection features 18 versions across all 7 arcade titles in the series, including the very first 1985 arcade version of GRADIUS, the long awaited GRADIUS III - Densetsu kara Shinwa e - port and the first-ever appearance of GRADIUS III AM Show Version for home consoles.
This collection includes various features such as rewind, quick save/load, easy mode, invincible mode, and training mode, providing detailed support for playing games that were previously impossible to clear.
body_raw:
[p]A collection featuring the 'Origins' of the 'GRADIUS' series!
Includes 'SALAMANDER III', an all new entree into the legendary side-scrolling shooter series!

This collection features 18 versions across all 7 arcade titles in the series, including the very first 1985 arcade version of GRADIUS, the long awaited GRADIUS III - Densetsu kara Shinwa e - port and the first-ever appearance of GRADIUS III AM Show Version for home consoles.

This collection includes various features such as rewind, quick save/load, easy mode, invincible mode, and training mode, providing detailed support for playing games that were previously impossible to clear. 

[dynamiclink href="https://store.steampowered.com/app/2897590/_/"][/dynamiclink][/p]

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
The story begins on one of the many planets in the Sakura Cosmos: Granbell, the Kingdom of Dreams, where a boy named Shiki lives alongside androids. After a chance encounter with the video creator Rebecca, he ends up taking off into space…
This is a 3D action role-playing game based on the space fantasy comic/anime EDENS ZERO by Hiro Mashima, creator of Fairy Tail and Rave Master.
The player controls a diverse cast of characters as they embark on an epic adventure across different planets while battling powerful enemies!
Available for download now!
©Hiro Mashima/KODANSHA, NTV

Get an early look at the game, and start exploring the original manga and anime’s story, and new game-original quests!
Play your way through different planets as Shiki and Rebecca and experience the first part of this intense and suspenseful story.
Clear the first two chapters of Story Mode to unlock Exploration Mode on Blue Garden.
(Save data from the demo can be imported to carry over progress in the full game.)
(Achievements cannot be obtained in the trial version.)
Demo available for download now!
©Hiro Mashima/KODANSHA, NTV

source_title: Deliver At All Costs is Out Now!
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Buckle up and hit the road - Deliver At All Costs, the high-octane, narrative-driven action game, is available now!
Crash through obstacles, dodge furious townsfolk, and take on chaotic delivery missions in a 1950s-inspired world where destruction is just part of the job.
Get behind the wheel, cause some serious mayhem, and uncover Winston’s story - one smashed delivery at a time.
https://store.steampowered.com/app/1880610/Deliver_At_All_Costs/

source_title: Deliver At All Costs Brings the Chaos on May 22 – Pre-Orders Now Available!
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Get ready to smash, crash, and deliver like never before! Deliver At All Costs, the high-octane, narrative-driven action game, launches May 22!
From dodging furious townsfolk to plowing through fences in your trusty pickup truck, every delivery is a high-stakes mission in a 1950s-inspired world filled with destruction and absurdity.
Starting today, digital pre-orders are live – and there’s a 10% discount for early adopters!
https://store.steampowered.com/app/1880610/Deliver_At_All_Costs/

source_title: Suikoden I&II HD Remaster on sale!
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Suikoden I&II HD Remaster on sale March 6!
https://store.steampowered.com/app/1932640/
The Story of Suikoden I
A once renowned hero turns into a violent tyrant, and an empire falls into decline.
A Liberation Army is rising up in an act of rebellion against an oppressive rule.
One by one the 108 stars of Destiny gather to shape the course of history.
The Story of Suikoden II
Our story's hero and his friend Jowy are members of the Unicorn Youth Brigade, which participated in a drawn-out border dispute between the Highland Kingdom and the City-States of Jowston .
A few months earlier, a truce agreement was signed between the two forces, both of which were happy to see an end to the fighting.
body_raw:
[h3]Suikoden I&II HD Remaster on sale March 6![/h3]

https://store.steampowered.com/app/1932640/

[u]The Story of Suikoden I[/u]
A once renowned hero turns into a violent tyrant, and an empire falls into decline.
A Liberation Army is rising up in an act of rebellion against an oppressive rule.
One by one the 108 stars of Destiny gather to shape the course of history.

[u]The Story of Suikoden II[/u]
Our story's hero and his friend Jowy are members of the Unicorn Youth Brigade, which participated in a drawn-out border dispute between the Highland Kingdom and the City-States of Jowston .
A few months earlier, a truce agreement was signed between the two forces, both of which were happy to see an end to the fighting.

source_title: Deliver At All Costs Demo is Available Now!
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Jump into Winston’s pick-up truck and experience the first two chapters of this destruction-filled delivery adventure.
From floating through town with balloon deliveries to navigating treacherous terrain with mouldy watermelons, this quirky, 1950s-inspired world is packed with mayhem, mystery and fully destructible environments.
Play now and get an early taste before Deliver At All Costs officially joins Steam Next Fest on February 24th.
https://store.steampowered.com/app/1880610/Deliver_At_All_Costs/

source_title: METAL GEAR SOLID Δ: SNAKE EATER - Release Date Announced & Starting Pre-Orders
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
★Standard Edition★
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2417610/METAL_GEAR_SOLID_D_SNAKE_EATER/
★Digital Deluxe Edition★
https://store.steampowered.com/sub/1191462/
●Release Date Trailer
Check out the latest footage.
●Digital Deluxe Edition
The Digital Deluxe Edition includes both the game and the Sneaking DLC Pack at a reduced price.
Includes:
●METAL GEAR SOLID Δ: SNAKE EATER
●Sneaking DLC Pack
・Uniform: Battle Dress (PW ver.)
・Uniform: Sneaking Suit (PW ver.)
・Uniform: Crocodile Suit
・Uniform: Naked Woodland
・Uniform: Naked Ammunition Belt
・Uniform: Gold
・Face: Glasses
・Face: Sunglasses
・Equipment: Kerotan Mask
・Equipment: GA-KO Mask
Bonus Content
・Uniform: White Tuxedo
*This content is also obtainable through in-game progress.
★Digital Deluxe Edition Exclusive Pre-Order Bonus★
・48-Hours Early Access
*Begins 48 hours in advance of release date.
●The minigame from the original game is also back!
In this mode, you'll play as Snake, and round up all the escaped Pipo Monkeys running amok in each stage!
And more…

announcement_body.headline: METAL GEAR SOLID Δ: SNAKE EATER - Release Date Announced & Starting Pre-Orders
announcement_body.body:
[b]★Standard Edition★[/b]
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2417610/METAL_GEAR_SOLID_D_SNAKE_EATER/

[b]★Digital Deluxe Edition★[/b]
https://store.steampowered.com/sub/1191462/

[b]●Release Date Trailer[/b]
Check out the latest footage.
[previewyoutube=KflwVzVIk_o;full][/previewyoutube]

[b]●Digital Deluxe Edition[/b]
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44190330/46f11e702bde3e441665b38bbaa3ea58800f9405.png[/img]
The Digital Deluxe Edition includes both the game and the Sneaking DLC Pack at a reduced price.

Includes:
●METAL GEAR SOLID Δ: SNAKE EATER
●Sneaking DLC Pack
・Uniform: Battle Dress (PW ver.)
・Uniform: Sneaking Suit (PW ver.)
・Uniform: Crocodile Suit
・Uniform: Naked Woodland
・Uniform: Naked Ammunition Belt
・Uniform: Gold
・Face: Glasses
・Face: Sunglasses
・Equipment: Kerotan Mask
・Equipment: GA-KO Mask

Bonus Content
・Uniform: White Tuxedo
*This content is also obtainable through in-game progress.

★Digital Deluxe Edition Exclusive Pre-Order Bonus★
・48-Hours Early Access
*Begins 48 hours in advance of release date.

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44190330/f40d9c9673605d92506f93ada117aa91c20d34e0.png[/img]

[b]●The minigame from the original game is also back![/b]
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44190330/79ebc2f02a4547377d7300d0b586a83273bea55d.png[/img]
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44190330/71d5a2e288537f56d2281e5cc778903811b3b1c6.png[/img]
In this mode, you'll play as Snake, and round up all the escaped Pipo Monkeys running amok in each stage!

And more…

body_text:
The “Castlevania Fair” sale, featuring select titles from the “Castlevania” series, is now being held on the Steam Store!
The “Castlevania Dominus Collection” is also on sale for the first time, with a 20% discount!

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Duelists from Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL, Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS, and the Yu-Gi-Oh! TRADING CARD GAME are gathering to compete in their respective games for the title of World Champions.​
Tune into the Duels for each category from Swiss Rounds on September 7, all the way to the Grand Finals on September 8 and learn new strategies to play with in Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL and Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS.​
​​Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2024 Livestream Schedule:​
- Day 1 ​Livestream 08:40AM ~ 08:00PM PDT​
- Day 2 Livestream 08:40AM ~ 07:00PM PDT​
​Check out the in-game notification for more details!
body_raw:
Duelists from Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL, Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS, and the Yu-Gi-Oh! TRADING CARD GAME are gathering to compete in their respective games for the title of World Champions.​

Tune into the Duels for each category from Swiss Rounds on September 7, all the way to the Grand Finals on September 8 and learn new strategies to play with in Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL and Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS.​

​​Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2024 Livestream Schedule:​

[list]
[*] Day 1 ​Livestream 08:40AM ~ 08:00PM PDT​
[*] Day 2 Livestream 08:40AM ~ 07:00PM PDT​
[/list]

announcement_body.headline: Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2024
announcement_body.body:
Duelists from Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL, Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS, and the Yu-Gi-Oh! TRADING CARD GAME are gathering to compete in their respective games for the title of World Champions.​

Tune into the Duels for each category from Swiss Rounds on September 7, all the way to the Grand Finals on September 8 and learn new strategies to play with in Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL and Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS.​

​​Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2024 Livestream Schedule:​

[list]
[*] Day 1 ​Livestream 08:40AM ~ 08:00PM PDT​
[*] Day 2 Livestream 08:40AM ~ 07:00PM PDT​
[/list]

​Check out the in-game notification for more details!

source_title: プロ野球スピリッツ2024-2025　9/19発売決定
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
「プロ野球スピリッツ」シリーズ20周年記念作品
シリーズ最新作は次世代の野球エンジン「eBaseball™ Engine」を搭載し、Steamに対応。
プロ野球チームのGM兼社長になって日本一の球団を目指す「myBALLPARK」モードや、高校野球の監督として甲子園優勝を目指す「白球のキセキ」モードを新たに搭載します。
定番モードの「スタープレイヤー」「ペナントレース」もパワーアップ！
https://store.steampowered.com/app/2051010/20242025/
詳しくは公式サイトをご確認ください
https://www.konami.com/games/prospi/2024-2025/

「プロ野球スピリッツ」シリーズ20周年記念作品

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Bomberman is back with more content than ever before!
SUPER BOMBERMAN R 2 is now available.
Play together with friends and family!
Classic game modes from previous Bomberman titles such as Battle 64 and Grand Prix make a return alongside new Castle Mode; a new asymmetrical rush of defender versus attacker action.
In this new game mode players are divided into two groups: attackers and defenders. Defenders must guard several keys that open treasure chests scattered throughout the play area, meanwhile attackers blow through obstacles to secure the loot. Attackers, watch out! The defending side will have access to traps and other gimmicks to slow you down, run down the clock, and secure the castle.
Conquer unique stages alongside your buddies or go head-to-head and see who will be crowned king of the castle!
Play your way with Stage Editor
Nurture your creative side with Stage Editor, a new feature in SUPER BOMBERMAN R 2 that puts players in control of making new maps to play with friends! Edit existing stages or start from scratch to create your dream battle mode layout.
Players can also share their creations online for others to enjoy. The possibilities to find and create new fun stages to play are endless!
A threat to peace in the galaxy
Peace hangs in the balance as a new threat looms over the galaxy. The Bomberman Brothers stand up to the challenge in this new story mode that takes players to new worlds. Face new boss battles and defeat enemy strongholds to free the galaxy!
Light up any game night with SUPER BOMBERMAN R 2!

announcement_body.headline: Super Bomberman R 2 Out Now!
announcement_body.body:
Bomberman is back with more content than ever before!
SUPER BOMBERMAN R 2 is now available.

Play together with friends and family!
Classic game modes from previous Bomberman titles such as Battle 64 and Grand Prix make a return alongside new Castle Mode; a new asymmetrical rush of defender versus attacker action.
In this new game mode players are divided into two groups: attackers and defenders. Defenders must guard several keys that open treasure chests scattered throughout the play area, meanwhile attackers blow through obstacles to secure the loot. Attackers, watch out! The defending side will have access to traps and other gimmicks to slow you down, run down the clock, and secure the castle.
Conquer unique stages alongside your buddies or go head-to-head and see who will be crowned king of the castle!

Play your way with Stage Editor
Nurture your creative side with Stage Editor, a new feature in SUPER BOMBERMAN R 2 that puts players in control of making new maps to play with friends! Edit existing stages or start from scratch to create your dream battle mode layout.
Players can also share their creations online for others to enjoy. The possibilities to find and create new fun stages to play are endless!

A threat to peace in the galaxy
Peace hangs in the balance as a new threat looms over the galaxy. The Bomberman Brothers stand up to the challenge in this new story mode that takes players to new worlds. Face new boss battles and defeat enemy strongholds to free the galaxy!

Light up any game night with SUPER BOMBERMAN R 2!

body_text:
"I want more people to enjoy the game I put my ideas and passions into."
For those of you, we support and cheer up for you!

To respond creators' wish as such, Konami would like to cultivate a place for indie games to meet more players, where creators and users, creators and creators can communicate with each other. Konami has been holding Indie Games Connect since 2022 to build connections among indie game creators.
In commemoration of Indie Games Connect 2023 on April 30, sale is underway.
Check out at our exhibtion & spot sale event and don't miss this chance if you've already got any titles of interest or become interested after watching their PV.

subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Finally, after four years, the Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023 will be held in Japan in August!
Qualifiers leading up to the World Championship for Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL and Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS will start in May on Steam. Check out the website below for more information!
body_raw:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39026134/66ed9da705a9dc051b3b2a9983b3b30e2ae64a9c.png[/img]

[h3]Finally, after four years, the Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023 will be held in Japan in August![/h3]

[h3]Qualifiers leading up to the World Championship for [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i] and [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/i] will start in May on Steam. Check out the website below for more information![/h3]

[h3]Win your way through the Qualifiers to compete in the Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023 Finals! Check the in-game notifications for more details![/h3]","[h3]Duellanten aus [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! [h3]Qualifikationsrunden für [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i] und [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/i] beginnen im Mai auf Steam.[/h3]

[h3]Gewinnen Sie in den Qualifikationsrunden, um im Finale der Yu-Gi-Oh! Weltmeisterschaft 2023 antreten zu können! Weitere Informationen erhalten Sie in den Benachrichtigungen im Spiel.[/h3]","[h3]Une foule de duellistes [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i], [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/i], et Yu-Gi-Oh! [h3]Les qualifications pour [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i] et [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/i] commenceront dès le mois de mai, sur Steam.[/h3]

[h3]Remportez vos matchs lors des qualifications pour vous assurer une place lors des matchs de finale Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023 ! Consultez vos notifications en jeu pour en savoir plus ![/h3]","[h3]I Duellanti del [i] MASTER DUEL[/i], del [i] DUEL LINKS[/i] e del TRADING CARD GAME di Yu-Gi-Oh! si riuniranno per competere nelle rispettive categorie per il titolo di Migliore Duellante del Mondo.[/h3]

[h3]Le qualifiche per il [i] MASTER DUEL[/i] e per il [i] DUEL LINKS[/i] avranno inizio a maggio su Steam.[/h3]

[h3]Vinci le qualifiche per competere nelle Finali del Campionato mondiale 2023 di Yu-Gi-Oh! Controlla le notifiche in gioco per ulteriori dettagli.[/h3]","[h3][i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i], [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/i], Yu-Gi-Oh! TRADING CARD GAME의 듀얼리스트들이 모여 '세계 최고 듀얼리스트' 타이틀을 걸고 각 부문에서 경쟁합니다.[/h3]

[h3][i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i] 및 [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/i] 예선이 5월에 Steam에서 시작합니다.[/h3]

[h3]예선을 통과하여 Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023 결승에서 경쟁하세요! 더 자세한 내용은 게임 내 알림을 확인하세요![/h3]","[h3]Los competidores de [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i], [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/i] y Yu-Gi-Oh! TRADING CARD GAME convergerán para competir en las categorías respectivas y hacerse con el título de mejores duelistas del mundo.[/h3]

[h3]Las clasificatorias para [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i] y [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/i] empiezan en mayo en Steam.[/h3]

[h3]Ábrete camino hacia la victoria durante las clasificatorias para alcanzar la fase final del Campeonato Mundial 2023 de Yu-Gi-Oh! ¡Consulta las notificaciones dentro del juego para más información![/h3]","[h3]来自 [b]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/b]、[b]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/b] 以及 Yu-Gi-Oh! TRADING CARD GAME 的决斗者将集结并在自己的组别中争夺“世界最强决斗者”的称号。[/h3]

[h3][b]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/b] 及 [b]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/b] 资格赛将于 5 月在 Steam 上展开。[/h3]

[h3]在这些资格赛中脱颖而出的选手即可参加 Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023 总决赛！ 更多详情，参见游戏内通知！[/h3]","[h3][b]《Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL》[/b]、[b]《Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS》[/b]和《遊戲王》 交換卡牌的決鬥者們將齊聚一堂並在各自的組別中爭奪世界最強決鬥者的頭銜。[/h3]

[h3][b]《Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL》[/b]和[b]《Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS》[/b]資格賽將在 5 月於 Steam 上展開。[/h3]

[h3]在資格賽中取得勝利即可參與《遊戲王》 世界錦標賽 2023 決賽！ 詳情請見遊戲內通知！[/h3]","[h3]Дуэлянты, играющие в [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i], [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/i] и Yu-Gi-Oh! TRADING CARD GAME соберутся, чтобы сразиться в своих категориях за титул чемпиона мира.[/h3]

[h3]Отборочные этапы [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i] и [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/i] начнутся в Steam в мае.[/h3]

World Championship 2023 Website[/h2]
[url=https://www.konami.com/yugioh/worldchampionship/2023/en/][img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39026134/4ab8e81d4a42fca91558abce932f1be91d90f430.jpg[/img][/url]


*The first [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i] World Championship will be held in the form of Individual Duels for the Qualifiers and Team Battles for the Finals.
*Players will be permitted to enter and play in each of the three categories for the Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023 Qualifiers. However, players will be permitted to play in only one of the three categories for the Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023 Finals, even if the players qualified in multiple categories. 

©2020 Studio Dice／SHUEISHA, TV TOKYO, KONAMI
©Konami Digital Entertainment","[h2]Website der Yu-Gi-Oh! Weltmeisterschaft 2023[/h2]
[url=https://www.konami.com/yugioh/worldchampionship/2023/en/][img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39026134/4ab8e81d4a42fca91558abce932f1be91d90f430.jpg[/img][/url]


*Die erste Weltmeisterschaft für [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i] wird in folgender Form ausgetragen: in den Qualifikationsrunden als Einzelduelle und im Finale als Team-Schlachten.
*Spieler dürfen in jeder der drei Kategorien für die Qualifikationsrunden der Yu-Gi-Oh! Weltmeisterschaft 2023 teilnehmen und spielen. Im Finale der Yu-Gi-Oh! Weltmeisterschaft 2023 dürfen Spieler jedoch nur in einer der drei Kategorien antreten, selbst wenn sie sich für mehrere Kategorien qualifiziert haben. 

©2020 Studio Dice／SHUEISHA, TV TOKYO, KONAMI
©Konami Digital Entertainment","[h2]Site Web de Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023[/h2]
[url=https://www.konami.com/yugioh/worldchampionship/2023/en/][img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39026134/4ab8e81d4a42fca91558abce932f1be91d90f430.jpg[/img][/url]


*Le toute premier [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i] World Championship verra s'affronter des duellistes en matchs individuels lors des qualifications, puis en affrontements par équipe lors des matchs de finale.
*Les joueurs et joueuses seront autorisé(e)s à participer et jouer dans chacune des trois catégories des qualifications pour le Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023. Cependant, il ne sera possible de participer qu'à une seule des trois catégories de match de finale Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023, même si les duellistes se sont qualifié(e)s dans plusieurs catégories. 

©2020 Studio Dice／SHUEISHA, TV TOKYO, KONAMI
©Konami Digital Entertainment","[h2]Sito web del Campionato mondiale 2023 di Yu-Gi-Oh![/h2]
[url=https://www.konami.com/yugioh/worldchampionship/2023/en/][img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39026134/4ab8e81d4a42fca91558abce932f1be91d90f430.jpg[/img][/url]


*Il primo [i] Campionato mondiale MASTER DUEL[/i] di Yu-Gi-Oh! si svolgerà sotto forma di duello tra singoli per la fase delle qualifiche e come sfida tra squadre per le finali.
*I giocatori potranno accedere e giocare a ciascuna delle tre categorie delle qualifiche per il Campionato mondiale 2023. In ogni caso, i giocatori potranno competere solo in una delle tre categorie nelle finali del Campionato mondiale 2023, anche se si sono qualificati in più categorie. 

©2020 Studio Dice／SHUEISHA, TV TOKYO, KONAMI
©Konami Digital Entertainment","[h2]Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023 웹사이트[/h2]

*첫 번째 [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i] World Championship의 예선은 개인전(1:1 듀얼), 결승은 팀 배틀 형식으로 진행됩니다.

announcement_body.headline: Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023
announcement_body.body:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/39026134/66ed9da705a9dc051b3b2a9983b3b30e2ae64a9c.png[/img]

[h3]Finally, after four years, the Yu-Gi-Oh! World Championship 2023 will be held in Japan in August![/h3]

[h3]Qualifiers leading up to the World Championship for [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL[/i] and [i]Yu-Gi-Oh! DUEL LINKS[/i] will start in May on Steam. Check out the website below for more information![/h3]

source_title: Announcing the Official Release of Bail or Jail!
subtitle: see announcement body
body_text:
Let's play Bail or Jail!
The asymmetrical multiplayer game Bail or Jail will be released on Steam in 2022!
The asymmetrical multiplayer game Bail or Jail will be released on Steam in 2022. Play the demo for free starting from May 11, 2022!
A total of five modes are available: play with people worldwide in Quick Match, with friends in Friend Match, with friends who are already playing online through Join Friends, or with up to 4 people on a single PC in Local Multiplayer.
Look forward to more details on the release date and the free demo that will be available!
Synopsis
"When night draws near, a portal to the demon world shall appear."
Human children who enter the demon world shall have to play a game...
Will they emerge victorious against the Monsters and find their way home!?
How to Play
Bail or Jail - How to Play
- Humans -
If even a single Human remains free after the time limit, the Human team wins!
- Escape from pursuing Monsters
- Stun Monsters with your Lantern
- Bail your teammates out of trouble
- Monsters -
If the Monster captures every Human before times run out, the Monster wins!
- Look for Humans hidden away from plain sight
- Capture Humans that you find
- Stop their teammates from breaking them out of jail
More information will be released through the Official Twitter account.
body_raw:
[h1]Let's play Bail or Jail!
The asymmetrical multiplayer game Bail or Jail will be released on Steam in 2022![/h1]
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42282046/b3856225556c627f00ca3c16e665bc06547259fd.png[/img]

The asymmetrical multiplayer game Bail or Jail will be released on Steam in 2022. Play the demo for free starting from May 11, 2022!

A total of five modes are available: play with people worldwide in Quick Match, with friends in Friend Match, with friends who are already playing online through Join Friends, or with up to 4 people on a single PC in Local Multiplayer. 
Look forward to more details on the release date and the free demo that will be available!

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42282046/8f65127fa2195a191b68d6b25f9f8be660d6aec3.jpg[/img]

[h3]Synopsis[/h3]
"When night draws near, a portal to the demon world shall appear."
Human children who enter the demon world shall have to play a game...
Will they emerge victorious against the Monsters and find their way home!?

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42282046/98a7789d3ff48eee3dfe659fcdf37095ad6a6707.jpg[/img]

[h3]How to Play[/h3]
Bail or Jail - How to Play

- Humans -
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42282046/cace057d1f5a1cd08b47b6ec088f7bd35f8a8009.jpg[/img]
If even a single Human remains free after the time limit, the Human team wins!
[olist]
[*] Escape from pursuing Monsters
[*] Stun Monsters with your Lantern
[*] Bail your teammates out of trouble
[/olist]
- Monsters -
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/42282046/678c9142c26e3d1f1fd83d9a8c153301c4d58ecb.jpg[/img]
If the Monster captures every Human before times run out, the Monster wins!
[olist]
[*] Look for Humans hidden away from plain sight
[*] Capture Humans that you find
[*] Stop their teammates from breaking them out of jail
[/olist]
More information will be released through the [url=https://twitter.com/BailorJail_en]Official Twitter account[/url].

In celebration of the 5th anniversary of [url=https://store.steampowered.com/app/601510/YuGiOh_Duel_Links/]Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links[/url], we're giving away the UR card "Monster Reborn" (Legend foil rarity) in the game! 

Many awesome giveaways including Dream UR/SR Tickets, 1,000 Gems, a new Skill, and a Skill Ticket are being held as well, so don't miss out! 

A pre-built Deck "Sword of Paladin" that strengthens Dark Magician has also arrived in the game. Challenge Duelists around the world using your new Dark Magician Deck!
